cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the Dashboard renders all required controls when the user's email is not verified
cases.preconditions: User's email address is not yet verified.

steps.content: Verify the website selector near the logo.
steps.expected: The website selector should show the current site URL and allow switching/adding sites.

steps.content: Verify the email-verification banner below the header.
steps.expected: A banner "Check the [email] mailbox to verify your email address." with a "Resend Verification Email" link should be displayed.
Become a partner, Documentation, Notifications, and Profile should be displayed (no "Refer & Earn" while the email is unverified).
Dashboard, Cookie Banner, Cookie Manager, Consent Log, Languages, Advanced Settings, Legal Policies, and Reports should be displayed.
Cookie Policy Generator and Privacy Policy Generator options should be displayed.

steps.content: Verify the plan indicator in the header.
steps.expected: "Current plan: Free" and "Pageviews used: 0/5,000 (0%)" should be displayed, with a "Try Pro for free" button beside it.
Banner Status, Cookie Summary, Consent Trends, Pageviews, and Recent consent logs cards should be displayed.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the Dashboard renders all required controls when the user's email is verified

steps.content: Verify the website selector near the logo.
steps.expected: The website selector should show the current site URL and allow switching/adding sites.

steps.content: Verify the email-verification banner is absent.
steps.expected: No email-verification banner should be displayed once the email is verified.
Refer & Earn, Become a partner, Documentation, Notifications, and Profile should be displayed (Refer & Earn appears once the email is verified).
Dashboard, Cookie Banner, Cookie Manager, Consent Log, Languages, Advanced Settings, Legal Policies, and Reports should be displayed.
Cookie Policy Generator and Privacy Policy Generator options should be displayed.

steps.content: Verify the plan indicator in the header.
steps.expected: "Current plan: Free" and "Pageviews used: 0/5,000 (0%)" should be displayed, with a "Try Pro for free" button beside it.
Banner Status, Cookie Summary, Consent Trends, Pageviews, and Recent consent logs cards should be displayed.
